data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: The '{0}' field is not a valid email address.

data.name: StringLengthBetween
data.value: The '{0}' must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.

data.name: UsernameRegex
data.value:
Invalid username format. Usernames must meet the following criteria:
  • Begin with a letter or a digit.
  • Can contain letters, digits, periods (.), or underscores (_).
  • Cannot contain two consecutive periods (.) or underscores (_).
  • End with a letter or a digit.

data.name: MaxLengthValidationError
data.value: The maximum length of field '{0}' must not be greater than {1} symbols.

data.name: MinLenghtValidationError
data.value: The minimum length of field '{0}' must not be less than {1} symbols.

data.name: FirstnameRegex
data.value:
Invalid first name format. First name must meet the following criteria:
  • Start with a capital letter (including Estonian characters: Ä, Ö, Ü, Õ, Š, Ž).
  • Contain only lowercase letters after the first (ä, ö, ü, õ, š, ž, and Latin letters a–z).
  • Can include a hyphen (`-`) or a space (` `), but not both together.
  • Each part of the first name after a separator must start with a capital letter.
  • No digits, special characters, or consecutive spaces/hyphens are allowed.

data.name: LastnameRegex
data.value:
Invalid last name format. Last Name must meet the following criteria:
  • Start with a capital letter (including Estonian characters: Ä, Ö, Ü, Õ, Š, Ž).
  • Contain only lowercase letters after the first (ä, ö, ü, õ, š, ž, and Latin letters a–z).
  • No hyphens, spaces, digits, or special characters are allowed.
